topics.title: Satellite Radio Competition and Media Criticism
topics.summary: The studio discusses the perceived smear campaign against satellite radio, the launch of an Oprah-branded channel on XM, and the differences in advertising revenue between terrestrial and satellite platforms.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey and Satellite Radio Competition
topics.summary: The studio discusses Oprah Winfrey's transition to satellite radio, the perceived lack of media coverage regarding her success, and the ongoing competition between satellite and terrestrial radio platforms.

topics.title: Two Truths and a Lie Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a game of "two truths and a lie" with a caller, who reveals personal anecdotes about her past experiences in summer camp and traveling through Europe.

topics.title: Two Truths and a Lie Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a game where George shares personal anecdotes about his experiences, including an incident involving a motorcycle and a public exposure in Scotland.

topics.title: Pregnant Woman Drinking During Pregnancy
topics.summary: The show features a caller who claims she drinks a 12-pack of beer daily while seven months pregnant and refuses to stop despite warnings about fetal alcohol syndrome.

topics.title: Impact of Alcohol on Pregnancy and Star Trek
topics.summary: The studio discusses a caller's experience with prenatal alcohol exposure before transitioning into a discussion about upcoming Howard TV content, the television show Heroes, and the auctioning of original Star Trek props.

topics.title: Radio Show Highlights and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a variety of segments including discussions on memorabilia, a prank call involving an alien persona, a segment with guest George Takei, and a game regarding word counts from the previous day's broadcast.

topics.title: Reviewing Listener Submissions and Musical Tracks
topics.summary: The studio evaluates various listener submissions, including comedy bits, voice impressions from callers in England, and several musical tracks to determine which will be included in the upcoming broadcast.

topics.title: British Models and Sexualized Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts two British models who discuss their careers, personal lives, and experiences with various sexual devices during a segment involving physical displays.

topics.title: Interview with Rod Barry
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview Rod Barry, a former Marine who claims to be straight despite his career in the gay adult film industry.

topics.title: Porn Industry Career and Identity
topics.summary: The studio explores the experiences of a male adult film actor who maintains his identity as straight while performing in gay pornography for money.

topics.title: Ranking Guest Appearances and Emergency Calls
topics.summary: The studio features a ranking of guests based on physical appearance, a prank call involving a medical emergency, and a segment addressing prank callers.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Technology and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio explores the features of new satellite radio technology while discussing guest appearances, listener feedback regarding a colleague's personal confession, and an anecdote from George Takei about a prank involving a running license.

topics.title: Guest Drug Addiction Revelations
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses his past heroin addiction, the physical toll of withdrawal, and the use of medication to maintain functionality during film production.

topics.title: Upcoming Guest Appearances and News Segment
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming guest appearances from Aaron and Nick Carter, recent news regarding celebrity relationships and auctions, and the production of a television segment.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Legal Updates
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including celebrity legal issues, political controversies involving George Allen, reports on the health of Osama bin Laden, and an Australian student's date with a former Miss Universe.
